teaching.consulting_hours: Monday, 13:00-16:00 , B/A305 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) Tuesday, 13:00-16:00 , B/A305 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) Wednesday, 8:00-10:00 , B/A305 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) If you plan on coming during this time, please let me know in advance. Wednesday, 14:00-16:00 , B/A305 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) Thursday, 14:00-16:00 , B/A305 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) Friday, 15:00-16:00 , B/A305 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) Instead of meeting in person, we can use any available online tool. If you want to meet, let me know email, MS Teams ( veigend ), phone +420 731 137 853 personal: Discord, Facebook Outside of specified dates, consultations are possible after arranging them via email. Current information 4 March 2026: consultation hours are cancelled
